view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for linking to calendar invites and emails is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for linking to calendar invites and emails is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence from the linked use case explicitly states that a unique Zoom meeting link is generated and included in both the confirmation email and the calendar invites for both the therapist and the client. This directly confirms that the requirement of 'Link added to calendar invite and email' is met. The scenario described in the use case provides concrete evidence of the functionality being operational, thus validating the requirement.
